notice: GENERATED CODE - DO NOT MODIFY BY HAND.

feature.name: Event Detail
feature.description: Orchestrates Event Detail across the consumer app, public marketing projection, and exact-location route with explicit state, booking, registration handoff, navigation, directions, and evidence contracts.

actionScope.included: Booking-dock actions represented by EventDetailBookingDockAction plus opening the exact-location child projection.
excluded: Navigation chrome, sharing, saving, calendar, companion, organizer, messaging, authentication, and profile-completion actions remain owned and verified by their existing route and widget contracts.
Directions and exact-location child-route recovery belong to the Event Location Map projection below.

actions.description: Creates at most one active booking relationship for the viewer and event.
Cancels the viewer's single active booking for the event.
Creates at most one active waitlist relationship for the viewer and event.
Removes the viewer's single active waitlist relationship for the event.
Accepts one active waitlist offer and transitions it to a booking.
Declines one active waitlist offer without creating another offer action.
Opens the same event's exact-location map from the always-rendered Where section.

actionScope.included: Read-only public Event Detail handoffs to the Catch app, an official external registration source, the canonical organizer page, or the organizer claim flow.
excluded: The marketing projection never books, joins a waitlist, checks out, authenticates, or writes an event review.
Static path generation, canonical metadata, Event JSON-LD, sitemap inclusion, and missing-event fallback remain owned by the route and postbuild contracts.

actions.description: Hands an eligible Catch-native event to the configured app-store destination without claiming the website performed a booking.
Opens the supplied official source for an external event in a separate browser context.
Navigates to the canonical public organizer projection that supplied the event.
Exposes the organizer claim flow only when the canonical listing policy declares an enabled claim capability.

evidenceExceptions.reason: Missing Event Detail paths fall through to the canonical not-found route and are proved by route-model and postbuild tests rather than a duplicate Event Detail story.

actionScope.included: Closing the exact-location projection, retrying its Event Detail read model, and launching walking directions for the event's canonical starting point.
excluded: Map camera movement, network-tile loading, and marker rendering are presentation behavior rather than user decisions.
This read-only route does not search for, move, or persist event locations; LocationPickerScreen remains owned by host create/edit workflows.

actions.description: Closes the exact-location projection through its floating back control.
Invalidates the shared Event Detail read model after an event-location load failure.

Requests the platform's external maps application with walking directions to the exact starting coordinate, disables duplicate launches while pending, and restores the action with visible feedback after false or thrown failures.

evidenceExceptions.reason: These Event Location Map states have deterministic capture and Widgetbook evidence but no focused state-level test recorded by the screen authority.
Map masking remains planned until a canonical standalone full-screen map reference defines dynamic-region masks.
